notes: Recluse, ZERO relics, base Glintstone Staff (Bâton d'éclat, sorcery scaling display 159, ladder rate 1.0). R1 = Glintstone Pebble (base 152), R2 = Glintstone Arc (base 148) — both mono-hit. Displayed on-target damage at every character level 1..15. THIS DUAL CURVE calibrated two things at once: (a) SPELL_SCALING_CORRECTION = 0.9027 (flat least-squares over the 8 breakpoint points, INT 5..51 — the softcap curve itself is correct), and (b) proved the game grows stats LINEARLY between the 4 breakpoints -> runner.hero_stats_row now interpolates (was: freeze at last breakpoint). Full curve reproduced to <1 damage at all 15 levels.
